---
title: "My first website"
author: "Bárbara"
affiliation: "Universidade do Minho"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem    
    theme:
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
    self-contained: true
    lang: pt
---

# Presentation
This is Bárbara's website!

And this is a turtle
![A turtle](img/hawksbill_sea_turtle.jpg){#fig-turtle}

The @fig-turtle is cute

[Link to something](https://open.spotify.com/track/6I9VzXrHxO9rA9A5euc8Ak?autoplay_ok=1)

## Sub presentation

Sub section.

$$z= \dfrac{1-\mu}{\sigma}$${#eq-myequation}

### Sub sub section

In @eq-myequation , we wrote down an equation.
 
#### My paragraph

This is a paragraph.
